---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --c: #F5A623; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 12rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
        .ap-hero .gr { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 500px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ap h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ap .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ap-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-lk::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-b { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-b:hover { background: #d9901e; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .ev { border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 20px; padding: 2.5rem; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ev { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
        .ev:hover { border-color: var(--c); }
        .ev-badge { display: inline-block; background: var(--c); color: #fff; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 980px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev-badge-past { background: var(--g); }
        .ev h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
        .ev-date { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--c); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
        .ev-loc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--g); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev p { font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.55; flex-grow: 1; }
        .ev-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 1rem; }
        .ev-actions a { font-size: 0.88rem; }
        .rec { text-align: center; padding: 0 1rem; }
        .rec i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .rec h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
        .rec p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .rec-when { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--c); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 7rem 0 5rem; }
          .ap-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Events</span></h1>
    <p>Hackathons, workshops, and programs. Connect, learn, and build together.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming events</h2>
    <p class="sub">Register early — spots are limited.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="ev">
          <div class="ev-badge">New</div>
          <h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3>
          <div class="ev-date"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i> March 5, 2026</div>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Bucharest</div>
          <p>A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and AI systems that prioritize human values.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions">
            <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
            <a href="/academy/events/ical/ai-ethics-hackathon-2025.ics" class="ap-lk" download><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus me-1"></i>Add to calendar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="ev">
          <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
          <div class="ev-date"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i> September 15, 2026</div>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Bucharest</div>
          <p>Hands-on hardware workshop for makers, DIY experts, and hardware hackers. Build projects and share knowledge.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions">
            <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
            <a href="/academy/events/pdfs/makers-workshop.pdf" class="ap-lk" download><i class="bi bi-file-pdf me-1"></i>PDF</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="ev">
          <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
          <div class="ev-date"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i> August 1–15, 2026</div>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova</div>
          <p>Two-week intensive program in cybersecurity, cloud, and AI. For students and professionals building technical careers.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions">
            <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
            <a href="/academy/events/ical/summer-school-2025.ics" class="ap-lk" download><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus me-1"></i>Add to calendar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="ev">
          <h3>SpaceApps Challenge 2026</h3>
          <div class="ev-date"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i> October 2026</div>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova</div>
          <p>NASA's international hackathon — develop solutions for space exploration, satellite tech, and Earth observation.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions">
            <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
            <a href="/academy/events/ical/space-hackathon-2025.ics" class="ap-lk" download><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus me-1"></i>Add to calendar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Recurring events</h2>
    <p class="sub">Join our community through regular meetups and talks.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Open discussion, knowledge sharing, and hands-on exploration of current tech.</p><div class="rec-when">Last Thursday of every month</div><a href="https://clubul.computer/" class="ap-lk">View schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry experts sharing insights on emerging technologies and best practices.</p><div class="rec-when">First Tuesday of every month</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ap-lk">Upcoming talks</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Coding sessions — personal projects, open-source contributions, and learning challenges.</p><div class="rec-when">Check calendar</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ap-lk">Join session</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past highlights</h2>
    <p class="sub">A look at what we've done.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="ev">
          <div class="ev-badge ev-badge-past">2024</div>
          <h3>Cyber Hygiene for Kids</h3>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova · November 2024</div>
          <p>Conference on screen time, social media safety, and digital boundaries for children. With Rotary Club Probitas Craiova.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions"><a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" class="ap-lk" target="_blank">Read more</a></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="ev">
          <div class="ev-badge ev-badge-past">2023</div>
          <h3>Capture the Flag Hackathon</h3>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova · November 2023</div>
          <p>Web exploitation, cryptography, reverse engineering, and digital forensics. Invitation-only competition.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="ev">
          <div class="ev-badge ev-badge-past">Since 2016</div>
          <h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3>
          <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Linköping · Gothenburg · Craiova</div>
          <p>9 editions of NASA's hackathon across Sweden and Romania. From Mjardevi Science Park to Craiova.</p>
          <div class="ev-actions"><a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" class="ap-lk" target="_blank">Read the story</a></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Subscribe to get event updates, or book a call to discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="ap-b">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-lk" style="padding-top:0.85rem;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
